title: Promoter Group Reclassification Request for Shreyas Shibulal and Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that its Board had approved requests from Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal to reclassify their names from the 'Promoter and promoter group' category to 'Public' under Regulation 31A of SEBI LODR. The document contains no financial, operational, strategic, or ownership-quantum details.

key_facts.fact: The Board of Infosys approved requests from Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal for reclassification from 'Promoter and promoter group' to 'Public'.
The reclassification request was made in terms of Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

important_text_spans.text: approval by the Board of the Company for  the  request  received  from  Mr.  Shreyas  Shibulal  and  Ms.  Bhairavi  Madhusudhan  Shibulal  seeking reclassification of their names from the category of 'Promoter and promoter group' of the Company to 'Public'
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event and identifies the individuals involved in the reclassification request.

processing_notes: Excluded stock-exchange application submission details as administrative. No shareholding percentage, financial impact, or effective reclassification approval from exchanges is stated.
